# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _

def ALLOWED_COMMANDS = [
    'mvn', 'gradle', 'npm', 'yarn', 'docker', 'kubectl', 'helm',
    'python', 'pip', 'pytest', 'go', 'cargo', 'make', 'ant',
    'dotnet', 'nuget', 'composer', 'bundle', 'rake', 'gem'
]

def BLOCKED_PATTERNS = [
    /.*[;&|`$(){}[\]<>].*/, // Shell metacharacters
    /.*\.\..*/,             // Path traversal
    /.*rm\s+-rf.*/,         // Dangerous rm commands
    /.*sudo.*/,             // Privilege escalation
    /.*curl.*\|.*sh.*/,     // Piped execution
    /.*wget.*\|.*sh.*/,     // Piped execution
    /.*eval.*/,             // Code evaluation
    /.*exec.*/,             // Direct execution
    /.*\/etc\/passwd.*/,    // System file access
    /.*\/etc\/shadow.*/,    // System file access
    /.*chmod\s+777.*/,      // Insecure permissions
    /.*>\s*\/dev\/.*/       // Device access
]

def ALLOWED_PATHS = [
    '/workspace',
    '/tmp/jenkins-builds',
    '/opt/build-tools'
]

properties([
    parameters([
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_TOOL',
            choices: ['maven', 'gradle', 'npm', 'docker', 'python', 'go', 'dotnet', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select build tool'
        ),
        text(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Build command (e.g., clean install, build, test)'
        ),
        text(
            name: 'TEST_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Test command (e.g., test, verify, run tests)'
        ),
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Deployment command'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Working directory for commands'
        ),
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip test execution'
        ),
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip deployment'
        ),
        choice(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['dev', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'ADDITIONAL_ARGS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Additional arguments (space-separated)'
        )
    ]),
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10')),
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
])

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'docker'
    }
    
    options {
        timeout(time: 1, unit: 'HOURS')
        timestamps()
        ansiColor('xterm')
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}"
        BUILD_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: "date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S", returnStdout: true).trim()
        SANITIZED_ENV = "${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Parameter Validation ==="
                    
                    validateCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, 'BUILD_COMMAND')
                    validateCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND, 'TEST_COMMAND')
                    validateCommand(params.DEPLOY_COMMAND, 'DEPLOY_COMMAND')
                    validateCommand(params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS, 'ADDITIONAL_ARGS')
                    validateWorkingDirectory(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                    
                    echo "All parameters validated successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Setup Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Environment Setup ==="
                    
                    sh '''
                        mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE}/build-logs
                        mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE}/test-results
                        mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE}/artifacts
                    '''
                    
                    def buildToolVersion = getBuildToolVersion(params.BUILD_TOOL)
                    echo "Using ${params.BUILD_TOOL} version: ${buildToolVersion}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.BUILD_COMMAND != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Build Stage ==="
                    
                    def buildCmd = constructCommand(
                        params.BUILD_TOOL,
                        params.BUILD_COMMAND,
                        params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS
                    )
                    
                    executeSecureCommand(
                        buildCmd,
                        params.WORKING_DIRECTORY,
                        'build'
                    )
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { params.TEST_COMMAND != '' }
                    expression { params.SKIP_TESTS == false }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Test Stage ==="
                    
                    def testCmd = constructCommand(
                        params.BUILD_TOOL,
                        params.TEST_COMMAND,
                        params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS
                    )
                    
                    executeSecureCommand(
                        testCmd,
                        params.WORKING_DIRECTORY,
                        'test'
                    )
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        collectTestResults()
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Security Scan') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Security Scan ==="
                    
                    performSecurityScan(params.BUILD_TOOL)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { params.DEPLOY_COMMAND != '' }
                    expression { params.SKIP_DEPLOY == false }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deployment Stage ==="
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production') {
                        input message: 'Deploy to production?', ok: 'Deploy'
                    }
                    
                    def deployCmd = constructCommand(
                        params.BUILD_TOOL,
                        params.DEPLOY_COMMAND,
                        params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS
                    )
                    
                    executeSecureCommand(
                        deployCmd,
                        params.WORKING_DIRECTORY,
                        'deploy'
                    )
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            script {
                archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'build-logs/**/*', allowEmptyArchive: true
                archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'test-results/**/*', allowEmptyArchive: true
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed"
        }
        cleanup {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}

def validateCommand(String command, String paramName) {
    if (!command || command.trim().isEmpty()) {
        return
    }
    
    echo "Validating ${paramName}: ${command}"
    
    for (pattern in BLOCKED_PATTERNS) {
        if (command =~ pattern) {
            error("Security violation in ${paramName}: Command contains blocked pattern - ${pattern}")
        }
    }
    
    def tokens = command.tokenize(' ')
    def baseCommand = tokens[0]
    
    if (baseCommand.contains('/') || baseCommand.contains('\\')) {
        error("Security violation in ${paramName}: Absolute paths not allowed in commands")
    }
    
    if (command.length() > 1000) {
        error("Security violation in ${paramName}: Command exceeds maximum length")
    }
    
    def dangerousChars = ['<', '>', '|', '&', ';', '`', '$', '(', ')', '{', '}', '[', ']']
    for (char in dangerousChars) {
        if (command.contains(char)) {
            error("Security violation in ${paramName}: Command contains dangerous character: ${char}")
        }
    }
    
    echo "${paramName} validation passed"
}

def validateWorkingDirectory(String workDir) {
    echo "Validating working directory: ${workDir}"
    
    if (workDir.contains('..')) {
        error("Security violation: Path traversal detected in working directory")
    }
    
    if (workDir.startsWith('/') && !workDir.startsWith(WORKSPACE)) {
        def isAllowed = ALLOWED_PATHS.any { workDir.startsWith(it) }
        if (!isAllowed) {
            error("Security violation: Working directory outside allowed paths")
        }
    }
    
    echo "Working directory validation passed"
}

def constructCommand(String buildTool, String command, String additionalArgs) {
    def sanitizedCommand = command.replaceAll(/[;&|`$(){}[\]<>]/, '').trim()
    def sanitizedArgs = additionalArgs.replaceAll(/[;&|`$(){}[\]<>]/, '').trim()
    
    def fullCommand = ''
    
    switch(buildTool) {
        case 'maven':
            fullCommand = "mvn ${sanitizedCommand}"
            break
        case 'gradle':
            fullCommand = "./gradlew ${sanitizedCommand}"
            break
        case 'npm':
            fullCommand = "npm ${sanitizedCommand}"
            break
        case 'docker':
            fullCommand = "docker ${sanitizedCommand}"
            break
        case 'python':
            fullCommand = "python ${sanitizedCommand}"
            break
        case 'go':
            fullCommand = "go ${sanitizedCommand}"
            break
        case 'dotnet':
            fullCommand = "dotnet ${sanitizedCommand}"
            break
        case 'custom':
            def baseCmd = sanitizedCommand.tokenize(' ')[0]
            if (!ALLOWED_COMMANDS.contains(baseCmd)) {
                error("Security violation: Command '${baseCmd}' not in allowed list")
            }
            fullCommand = sanitizedCommand
            break
        default:
            error("Unsupported build tool: ${buildTool}")
    }
    
    if (sanitizedArgs) {
        fullCommand += " ${sanitizedArgs}"
    }
    
    return fullCommand
}

def executeSecureCommand(String command, String workDir, String stage) {
    echo "Executing ${stage} command: ${command}"
    echo "Working directory: ${workDir}"
    
    def sanitizedWorkDir = workDir.replaceAll(/[;&|`$(){}[\]<>]/, '')
    
    def logFile = "${WORKSPACE}/build-logs/${stage}-${BUILD_TIMESTAMP}.log"
    
    def exitCode = sh(
        script: """
            set -e
            cd "${sanitizedWorkDir}"
            
            export PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
            unset LD_PRELOAD
            unset LD_LIBRARY_PATH
            
            ulimit -t 3600
            ulimit -f 10485760
            ulimit -v 4194304
            
            ${command} 2>&1 | tee "${logFile}"
        """,
        returnStatus: true
    )
    
    if (exitCode != 0) {
        error("Command failed with exit code ${exitCode}")
    }
    
    echo "${stage} command completed successfully"
}

def getBuildToolVersion(String buildTool) {
    def version = ''
    
    try {
        switch(buildTool) {
            case 'maven':
                version = sh(script: 'mvn --version | head -n 1', returnStdout: true).trim()
                break
            case 'gradle':
                version = sh(script: './gradlew --version | grep Gradle', returnStdout: true).trim()
                break
            case 'npm':
                version = sh(script: 'npm --version', returnStdout: true).trim()
                break
            case 'docker':
                version = sh(script: 'docker --version', returnStdout: true).trim()
                break
            case 'python':
                version = sh(script: 'python --version', returnStdout: true).trim()
                break
            case 'go':
                version = sh(script: 'go version', returnStdout: true).trim()
                break
            case 'dotnet':
                version = sh(script: 'dotnet --version', returnStdout: true).trim()
                break
            default:
                version = 'Unknown'
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        version = 'Not installed'
    }
    
    return version
}

def performSecurityScan(String buildTool) {
    echo "Performing security scan for ${buildTool} project"
    
    try {
        switch(buildTool) {
            case 'maven':
                sh 'mvn dependency-check:check || true'
                break
            case 'npm':
                sh 'npm audit || true'
                break
            case 'python':
                sh 'pip install safety && safety check || true'
                break
            case 'docker':
                sh 'trivy image --severity HIGH,CRITICAL . || true'
                break
            default:
                echo "No specific security scan configured for ${buildTool}"
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Security scan encountered an error: ${e.message}"
    }
}

def collectTestResults() {
    echo "Collecting test results"
    
    try {
        junit testResults: '**/target/surefire-reports/*.xml', allowEmptyResults: true
        junit testResults: '**/build/test-results/**/*.xml', allowEmptyResults: true
        junit testResults: '**/test-results/**/*.xml', allowEmptyResults: true
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "No JUnit test results found"
    }
    
    try {
        publishHTML([
            allowMissing: true,
            alwaysLinkToLastBuild: true,
            keepAll: true,
            reportDir: 'coverage',
            reportFiles: 'index.html',
            reportName: 'Coverage Report'
        ])
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "No coverage report found"
    }
}
